title: Map-Reduce Workflow State
description: Shared state threaded across the splitter -> analyst (x3) -> merger map-reduce pipeline.

question.description: The user's original question to answer.

sub_questions.description: Sub-questions produced by the splitter agent for parallel analysis.

partial_answers.description: Answers to each sub-question, produced by analyst instances in parallel.

final_answer.description: Synthesized final answer produced by the merger agent.
